reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark the review-variants read-mostly claim satisfied only for the product-owned CLI boundary and review-only variant behavior; do not claim arbitrary consumer command mutation prevention.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names review-variant candidate workspace behavior that can be checked with focused CLI smoke tests and artifact placement assertions.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by a CLI smoke test proving a review-only variant inspects `{candidate_repo}`, writes artifacts outside that candidate workspace, and leaves the candidate git status clean, plus adjacent tests covering candidate placeholder and structured output behavior.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the read-mostly smoke test current when review variants change workspace placeholder handling, artifact placement, or default review-only guidance.
